_DEMO: This is placeholder data — replace with your own. Any AI: see AGENTS.md → Onboarding.
_comment: First-run habit seed for the dashboard. On a fresh browser (empty local storage) the dashboard hydrates its weekly Habits matrix from this file, so an AI can write real habits here and the user sees them. Shape: schemas/habits.schema.json (id/notionId/updatedAt/weekOf and the day checkboxes are filled in on load — this week, all unchecked). Demo persona: Alex Rivera.
